✦ You're Invited ✦
2026

Small Deeds, Big Impact

1st July – 7th July 2026

A Note to Our Valued Partners

Dear Friend,

We are delighted to invite you to be a part of ATMS Good Deeds Week 2026 — our annual week-long initiative where we step beyond the boundaries of business to serve, care, and give back to the communities that make us who we are.

From blood donation drives and tree plantations to NGO visits and Roti Daan, every day of this week is a meaningful opportunity to make a tangible difference. Last year, hundreds of participants came together to create moments of warmth and hope — and this year, we want to do even more.

We believe that purpose-driven action is most powerful when it's collective. That's why we're reaching out to you — not just as our client, but as a partner in kindness.

Please take a moment to fill out the form below — tell us how you'd like to be involved.

With warm regards,
The ATMS Group Team 🌿

Making a Difference Together

Every visit, every smile, every moment of connection counts.

Week at a Glance

Seven days. Seven meaningful actions.

1stJulyWed
🎀
Opening Ceremony
Let's come together to begin a week of goodness.
2ndJulyThu
🩸
Blood Donation Drive
Donate blood, save lives and spread hope.
3rdJulyFri
🙏
Gratitude Day
Share kind words and encouragement · Express thanks and spread positivity.
4thJulySat
🏠
NGO Visit Day
Spend time, share smiles and support those in need.
5thJulySun
🫓🌱
Roti Daan & Tree Plantation
Share a meal, spread warmth and fight hunger · Plant trees for a greener tomorrow.
6thJulyMon
🔔
Yet to be Announced
Something special is being planned — stay tuned!
7thJulyTue
🏆
Closing Ceremony
Celebrate our impact and commit to keep doing good.
